threatgraph_indicators.description: A utility, such as forfiles.exe or pcaula.exe (Program Compatibility Assistant), that allows for command execution to bypass security restrictions that limit the use of command-line interpreters, was used. Investigate the process tree.

A process appears to have performed a system call by bypassing UMPPC hooks.
